datapoints.description: Total number of blobs in the store
datapoints.name: blob_count

datapoints.description: Total size of all blobs in bytes
datapoints.name: total_size_bytes

datapoints.description: Available space in the blob store in bytes
datapoints.name: available_space_bytes

description: Per-blob-store availability, capacity, utilization, and quota status for Nexus Repository Manager via REST API
technicalNotes: Discovery fetches GET /service/rest/v1/blobstores to enumerate all blob stores. Collection re-fetches the list for per-store metrics (blobCount, totalSizeInBytes, availableSpaceInBytes, unavailable) and queries /v1/blobstores/{name}/quota-status for quota violation state. used_percent is computed as totalSize / (totalSize + availableSpace) * 100.
name: Nexus_Blob_Store_Health
